title: Coin Loot
body:
# About
Makes coins drop when a mob is killed,

The higher the max health, the more coins it will drop:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oGBs1VTm/images/90a53771966ab0c185a106a2efd521320ce0465b.png)


![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oGBs1VTm/images/f87c93078f46277d29c3543896992d7556a78513.png)
